# eemr

R bindings (via Rcpp) for the original **eemCpp** coherence-based
expression module (EEM) search tool. Given an expression matrix and a
collection of candidate gene sets,
[`eem_search()`](https://atusiniida.github.io/eemr/reference/eem_search.md)
finds the coherently expressed subset of each gene set (“expression
module”) and assigns it a significance p-value, without leaving R (no
temp files, no CLI binary).

## Install

This repository is private, so `remotes`/`devtools` need a GitHub token
with access to it. The easiest way is to reuse the [GitHub
CLI](https://cli.github.com/)’s token if you’re already logged in
(`gh auth login`):

``` r

Sys.setenv(GITHUB_PAT = system("gh auth token", intern = TRUE))
# install.packages("remotes")  # if not already installed
remotes::install_github("atusiniida/eemr")
```

Alternatively, set `GITHUB_PAT` to a [personal access
token](https://github.com/settings/tokens) with `repo` scope (e.g. in
`~/.Renviron`).

If you have a local clone instead:

``` r

devtools::install("path/to/eemr")
```

## Usage

``` r

library(eemr)

expr <- as.matrix(read.table("expr.tab", header = TRUE, row.names = 1,
                              sep = "\t", check.names = FALSE))
geneSets <- read_gmt("genesets.gmt")

res <- eem_search(expr, geneSets)
head(res[, c("id", "pvalue", "nSeedGenes", "nModuleGenes")])

# module x sample activity matrix (mean row-standardized expression of each
# module's genes), restricted by default to modules with pvalue >= 6
# (-log10 scale, i.e. p < 1e-6)
activity <- module_activity(expr, res)
```

See
[`inst/examples/run_test.R`](https://atusiniida.github.io/eemr/inst/examples/run_test.R)
for a full example using the bundled sample dataset
(`inst/extdata/test.tab`, `test.gmt`).

## Functions

- `eem_search(expr, geneSets, ...)` — run the EEM search
- `read_gmt(file)` — read a GMT gene set file into a named list
- `module_activity(expr, result, normalize = TRUE, pvalueCutoff = 6)` —
  build a module x sample activity matrix from
  [`eem_search()`](https://atusiniida.github.io/eemr/reference/eem_search.md)
  results

# Package index

## All functions

- [`eem_search()`](https://atusiniida.github.io/eemr/reference/eem_search.md)
  : Coherence-based Expression Module (EEM) search
- [`eemr`](https://atusiniida.github.io/eemr/reference/eemr-package.md)
  [`eemr-package`](https://atusiniida.github.io/eemr/reference/eemr-package.md)
  : eemr: Coherence-Based Expression Module Search
- [`module_activity()`](https://atusiniida.github.io/eemr/reference/module_activity.md)
  : Compute a module x sample activity matrix
- [`read_gmt()`](https://atusiniida.github.io/eemr/reference/read_gmt.md)
  : Read a GMT gene set file
